title: Professional Kitchen Scissors, Cooking Scissors Made from Stainless Steel and Light Weight, Household Necessity All-Purpose Shears Sharp Blades
features: 1. Multi-purpose Sharp Scissors: Poultry scissors for chicken, poultry, fish, meat, vegetables, herbs and small bones. No need for a knife and board, shred cooked meat, trim fat and dice raw meat.
2. Made from Germany Stainless Steel: Durable, corrosion resistant. Really sharp- even snip herbs, cut and open tough cardboard or plastic packaging, trim flower stems a great kitchen tools.

3. Comfortable Grip Handles: The ergonomic handle we are made from TPR material, the material is qualitative soft. Great handles to get firm grip for both right and left handed chefs, dishwasher safe.
4. Extra Features: Additional bottle opener design in the blade for opening bottles and jars quickly and easily.

5. After-Sales Service: Our kitchen scissors go through rigorous inspection and testing to ensure our customers receive a quality kitchen heavy duty scissors. If you have any question, please contact us when you are free.
description: Product Description Clean and Care Instructions: Dishwasher safe Please rinse the kitchen scissor in warm water immediately after each use.
